title: Disposable Dehumidifier Bags - Box - 2-In-1 Condensation Absorbers for Flat Surfaces & Hanging - Compact 500ml Moisture Absorber Dehumidifiers for Home, Kitchen, Wardrobe, Garage, Basement - 10 Pack
features: Flat or Hanging - You Decide: This 2-in-1 mini dehumidifier is totally unique; You can either place it on a flat surface or attach one of the removable hooks and suspend in wardrobes, from window handles, or in tight spaces

Patented Compact Design: We compressed all the moisture-absorbing power of this damp absorber into a slim 4.8cm-deep rectangular profile; Plus, its clean lines and carefully chosen colour palette blend with any décor

Absorbs Moisture for Weeks: These disposable interior dehumidifiers run continuously 24/7 without electricity, gradually extracting moisture over 4-6 weeks until the calcium chloride crystals are completely dissolved

Easy to Use - Just Open & Place: With our disposable dehumidifier bags, you won't have to hunt around for power outlets, worry about sky-high electricity bills, or have to schedule filter changes or maintenance reminders
Full-Home Protection Pack: You'll receive 10 moisture absorber boxes (and 5 removable, reusable hooks), so you can enjoy protection across every room and space where humidity is a problem
description: Product Description 2-In-1 Design When you need moisture control on flat surfaces like windowsills, you simply use it as a box. When you need to protect clothes in wardrobes or hang them in tight spaces, you can attach the hook to the lid and hang vertically. Slim Profile We reimagined the bulky, oddly-shaped dehumidifier box into a sleek, rectangular profile that's only 4.8cm deep. The patented size and attractive colour scheme are designed to blend seamlessly into any modern home. Mega Absorption They'll work around the clock to pull moisture out of the air so you wake up to clear windows instead of condensation, and your clothes stay fresh instead of developing that damp smell. Each 500ml box has a 4-6 week lifespan. Multi-Room Solution You'll receive 10 individual dehumidifier boxes (bags), enabling you to deploy moisture control throughout your entire property strategically. This will allow you to solve your problem completely, not just in one room.
